continuation_backlog.title: Add incremental byte-stream parsing with resynchronization
continuation_backlog.description: Implement a streaming parser that accepts arbitrary byte chunks, emits decoded frames when complete, skips noise before the start byte, and recovers cleanly after bad checksums. Add tests for partial-frame, noise-resync, and recovery behavior.
validation_commands: if [ ! -d .venv ]; then python3 -m venv .venv; fi && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -e '.[dev]' && pytest
